settings.about.title: Strive for excellence. Shine with confidence.
settings.about.body1: Founded in 2024, Oxford Grammar School is a CBSE school in Marikal, Narayanpet district — built on one belief: every child is extraordinary when someone truly believes in them.
settings.about.body2: Our classrooms blend academics with art, sport and real-world learning — with modern science, maths and computer labs, a growing library and smart classrooms — so students grow curious, kind and confident.
settings.principal.name: Suvarna Raju N
settings.principal.message: At Oxford Grammar School, we strive for excellence and help every child shine with confidence. Our dedicated teachers nurture curious, kind and capable young people ready for the world ahead.
settings.contact.address: Raichur Road, Marikal (Village & Mandal), Narayanpet District, Telangana 509351
settings.disc.address: Raichur Road, Marikal (Village & Mandal), Narayanpet District, Telangana 509351

news.title: Annual Sports Meet 2025
news.excerpt: Three days of athletics, team spirit and record-breaking performances on the field.
news.body: Our Annual Sports Meet brought the whole campus alive with three days of athletics, relays and inter-house championships. Thank you to all the parents who cheered from the stands and to our PE department for a flawlessly organised event.

news.title: Vidya Niketan Wins State Science Olympiad
news.excerpt: Our students swept the top three positions at the State Science Olympiad 2025.
news.body: A proud moment for the Vidya Niketan family — our young scientists secured the top three positions at the State Science Olympiad 2025, competing against more than 200 schools. Congratulations to our students and mentors for this outstanding achievement.

news.title: Admissions Open for 2026–27
news.excerpt: Applications are now open for Nursery to Grade 10. Limited seats — book a campus visit today.
news.body: We are delighted to announce that admissions for the academic year 2026–27 are now open across all grades from Nursery to Grade 10. Prospective parents are invited to book a guided campus visit and meet our faculty. Seats are limited and offered on a first-come basis subject to an interaction.
